configurations.name: NX-Cast: Build & Upload
configurations.command: bash -lc 'NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; set +e; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink "$NRO_PATH"; nxlink_status=$?; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"'

configurations.name: NX-Cast: Build & Upload & nxlink server
configurations.command: bash -lc 'LOG_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; LOG_STAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; SESSION_LOG="$LOG_DIR/run_nxlink-$LOG_STAMP.log"; NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[run-nxlink] session_log=$SESSION_LOG"; set +e; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink -s "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; nxlink_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"'

configurations.name: NX-Cast: Upload
configurations.command: bash -lc 'NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; set +e; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink "$NRO_PATH"; nxlink_status=$?; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"'

configurations.name: NX-Cast: Upload & nxlink server
configurations.command: bash -lc 'LOG_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; LOG_STAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; SESSION_LOG="$LOG_DIR/run_nxlink-$LOG_STAMP.log"; NRO_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/NX-Cast.nro"; NXLINK_PREFIX=(); if command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1; then NXLINK_PREFIX=(stdbuf -oL -eL); fi; if [ ! -f "$NRO_PATH" ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] NRO not found: $NRO_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[run-nxlink] session_log=$SESSION_LOG"; set +e; "${NXLINK_PREFIX[@]}" nxlink -s "$NRO_PATH" 2>&1 | tee "$SESSION_LOG"; nxlink_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; set -e; if [ "$nxlink_status" -ne 0 ]; then echo "[run-nxlink] nxlink exited with status $nxlink_status"; fi; exit "$nxlink_status"'
